description: Groundwork dependency updates via the hosted Mend Renovate app (installed account-wide, Interactive mode). The surfaces here are GitHub Actions SHA pins and the Dockerfile base image digest. Operational notes live in PLAYBOOK.md.

Policy mirrors the roost repo: weekly schedule, 5 day cooldown, grouped non-major updates, immediate security PRs. When the shared renovate-config preset repo exists, replace extends with github>jasondockery/renovate-config so the policy is defined once.

Cooldown is 5 days (2026-07-05, aligned with roost): roost needs Renovate one day ahead of pnpm's 4-day timestamp-exact minimumReleaseAge (date-granularity trap, see roost tools/github/README.md). Groundwork has no pnpm layer so 4 would work here, but a differing value is drift the preset would have to resolve — shared policy, one value.

Security PRs automerge (decided 2026-07-04, aligning with roost — the automerge difference was drift, not policy): CI here proves the same things a human check would (render validation, gitleaks, Docker build + smoke test), and a vulnerable Action or base image should not wait on a manual merge. Shared policy — goes into the preset when it exists.
